name: Ether Userbot
description: A high-performance, modular Telegram userbot architecture built with Telethon + MongoDB.

API_ID.description: Your Telegram API ID from my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: Your Telegram API Hash from my.telegram.org

MONGO_URI.description: Your MongoDB connection string. You can get one for free at mongodb.com

DB_NAME.description: The name of the database to use

SESSION_NAME.description: The name of the session file

SESSION_DIR.description: The directory to store session files

DEBUG.description: Set to True to enable debug logging
